description_for_human: The #1 skill directory for AI coding agents. 38,000+ skills compatible with Claude, Manus, Cursor, Antigravity, OpenClaw and any agent supporting the AgentSkills standard. 100+ MCP connectors and an AI Solutions Architect.
description_for_model: AI Solutions Architect for coding agents. 48 tools across 8 categories: discovery (search/filter 38,000+ skills, 500+ MCP connectors, plugins, semantic_search for natural language queries, get_connector_details, list_popular_connectors, get_plugin_details, list_popular_plugins, get_directory_stats), AI architect (solve_goal builds two curated solution options with trust scores and install commands for any professional goal; get_role_kit returns tiered toolkits by role; suggest_stack recommends complete environment setups; check_compatibility provides quick compatibility verdicts; get_setup_guide generates step-by-step install guides), generation (generate_custom_skill creates SKILL.md files; suggest_for_skill_creation recommends dependencies; validate_skill checks quality without publishing), intelligence (trending_solutions, explain_combination, rate_recommendation, personalized_feed, get_top_creators, whats_new for recent catalog additions), security (get_trust_report for detailed trust/security breakdown, scan_skill for pre-publish security scanning), lifecycle (publish_skill with visibility/pricing control, import_skill_from_agent, update_skill with semantic versioning, unpublish_skill, report_skill), quality (run_skill_evals for automated testing, get_skill_analytics for creator analytics), and platform (a2a_query for agent-to-agent, agent_analytics, community templates, my_skills for authenticated catalog management, get_skill_content to read/fork skills, install_bundle for role-based bundles). Skills use the open AgentSkills standard and are compatible with Claude, Manus, Cursor, Antigravity, OpenClaw and more. For complex goals, ALWAYS use solve_goal first.
